§6ME Security Terminal§f:
The §6ME Security Terminal §f(appliedenergistics2:security_station) is a §enetwork access control block §f that §brestricts who §f can §6use the network §f and its §6wireless devices§f. It is the §6permission system §f for AE2.

§6Production Path (network/blocks/security_station.json)§f:
Pattern "aba / cdc / aea":
- §ba§f: §6Iron Ingot §f(ingotIron) — 6 (corners + bottom left + bottom right)
- §bb§f: §6ME Chest §f(appliedenergistics2:chest) — 1 (top middle)
- §cc§f: §6ME Glass Cable - Fluix §f(appliedenergistics2:part:16) — 2 (middle left, middle right)
- §cd§f: §6§a16k§r ME Storage Component §f(appliedenergistics2:material:37) — 1 (centre)
- §ce§f: §6Engineering Processor §f(appliedenergistics2:material:24) — 1 (bottom middle)
- Yields 1× ME Security Terminal

§6Function (BlockSecurityStation.java)§f:
- §bPlayer permissions §f: assign §b5 tiers §f of permission to players — §6NONE§f, §6ROTATE§f (open chest), §6DISABLE§f, §6CRAFT§f, §6SECURITY §f(full admin)
- §bWireless security §f: pair with a §6Wireless Access Point §f to gate §6Wireless Terminal §f access
- §bPer-player permissions §f: the security station stores §bup to 8 §f player permissions in its internal list
- §bLogging §f: every §6security event §f is logged in the security station's GUI
- §bPower draw §f: §b1 AE/t §f at idle, scales with §6wireless access §f usage
- §bChannel cost §f: §b1 channel §f from the host cable

§6Direct Descendants (TaskRetrieval graph)§f:
The jei-graph shows 0 items the ME Security Terminal is a component of, but it is referenced in 320 §6use sites §f across the mod pack. Common uses:
- §bMulti-player networks §f: prevent griefing of shared ME networks
- §bServer administration §f: gate §6Crafting Terminal §f access to specific players
- §bWireless network security §f: lock down §6Wireless Terminals §f

§6Practical Use§f:
- §eTip§f: place the §6Security Terminal §f near the §6Controller §f and §6Wireless Access Point §f for central control
- §eTip§f: use §6§a16k§r ME Storage Component §f to back up player permissions; a §cbroken §f Security Terminal will §close §f its permissions
- §cWarning§f: the §6NONE §f permission tier blocks §ball §fnetwork access, including §bviewing §f items in a §6Wireless Terminal §f
- §cWarning§f: a Security Terminal §cdoes not §f authenticate §6automation §f players (e.g. §6ME Pattern Provider §f) — those bypass the security check
